summary: EXP-409 closes ISS-1747 (SEC-4.2.7a EXP-276.c2 H4, minor cross-convention tension). Single-clause insertion in §4.2.7a "Even more constrained" subsection adds an explicit cross-reference to the P1 R_disc/180 robustness paragraph, making the convention dependency visible at the point where the 150 km claim appears. Numbers (75 km, 82 km, max-2) quoted verbatim from P1. review_class=verification per PROP-025 — batchable. Recommend: apply patch; close ISS-1747 fixed; queue curmudgeon verification on next sweep.
